Our Services

WHAT WE CAN DO FOR YOU

OCEAN FREIGHT SERVICES

At BRINKS, our ocean freight forwarding products facilitate the global relationships of more than 500,000 customers, across 130 countries. Whereever you need your shipments to go, our innovative solutions form the bridge to your sales and procurement markets.

READ MORE >

AIR FREIGHT

International freight forwarding is often a balancing act between time, cost and environmental concerns. That’s one of the reasons companies choose BRINKS for cost effective, smooth delivery of their cargo.

READ MORE >

GROUND FREIGHT

BRINKS offers both unmatched dependability and flexibility with our customized over-the-road trucking solutions. We have access to the equipment and capacity you need, no matter how exceptional your shipment is.

READ MORE >

CONTRACT FREIGHT

Our contract freight forwarding products facilitate the global relationships of more than 50,000 customers, across many countries.

READ MORE >

OUR CLIENTS

CLIENTS AND SUPPORTERS

I owe my success to having listened respectfully to the very best advice, and then going away and doing the exact opposite.

JOHN SMITH

CTO of KLM

Successful people do what unsuccessful people are not willing to do. Don’t wish it were easier; wish you were better.

PATRICK HEAD

ReConstruction LLC

The Most Progressive Company

MISSION AND CORE VALUES

BRINKS Global Platinum Services was founded to make a mark in Clearing and Forwarding industries. Our shipping services started its operations in all the major cities in US down to all parts of the world within the past few years with the aim to offer the best in logistics services.

We ship more than 190 countries and territories worldwide, and we’ve got Customer Service centres around the globe.

WHY CHOOSE US?

BRINKS COMMITMENT

With many years of experience in the logistics industry, BRINKS Global Platinum Services is your number one trusted plug for logistics services.

We are commited to be the leading logistic solutions provider to our customer. We continually improving & implementing a quality management to achieve it

  • Customer Satisfaction
  • Management and Reporting
  • Fastest Freight Services
Customer Satisfaction

Our aim is satisfying our customers, we do so by staying fidel with our promises.

Fastest Freight Services

We offer Elite fast freight services; from our grounds , air and ocean freights. We are proud to say we are one of the best in Logistics industry.

About Us

BRINKS Global Platinum Services was founded to make a mark in Clearing and Forwarding industries. Our shipping services started its operations in all the major cities in Europe down to all parts of the world within the past few years with the aim to offer the best in logistics services.
